news.title: Trump threatens tariffs of 50% on countries 'supplying military weapons to Iran'
news.summary: The U.S. will impose tariffs of 50% on goods imported to the country from any nation "supplying military weapons to Iran"

news.title: JD Vance calls Iran ceasefire a 'fragile truce' and says Trump is 'impatient to make progress'
news.summary: The U.S. vice president said the response from Iran to the ceasefire had varied, with some 'lying about even the fragile truce that we've already struck'

news.title: Oil prices plunge below $95 after Iran agrees to safe passage through Strait of Hormuz during ceasefire
news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump agreed to the ceasefire with Iran after discussions with Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif. The ceasefire will take place between the United States and Iran.

news.title: Markets shift back towards potential Fed rate cut this year with Iran ceasefire in place
news.summary: Odds for a reduction jumped Wednesday morning, hitting about 43%, according to the CME Group. Odds of a reduction in the U.S. debt ceiling hit about 43% Wednesday morning.

news.title: Delta CEO says airline will 'meaningfully' cut growth plans, sees $300 million boost from its refinery
news.summary: Delta is scaling back its flight plans as fuel costs grow. Delta is trying to reduce its expenses by cutting back on flights. The company is also trying to cut back on the number of flights it flies.

news.title: Why SpaceX could trade like a meme stock after its blockbuster IPO
news.summary: SpaceX has “a massive narrative, a founder with a loyal following, and a valuation likely driven in part by future potential,” says CNN’s John Sutter.

news.title: The U.S. government has found ‘alarming instances’ of nursing homes drugging residents and falsifying medical records
news.summary: Nursing homes are sedating vulnerable people in order to keep them docile. The aim is to make them more docile and less aggressive.

news.title: The $7 billion reason the Big Ten is dominating college sports
news.summary: A $7 billion TV deal and nationwide reach are fueling the Big Ten’s dominance in college sports. The Big Ten has won the national championship in each of the last three seasons.

news.title: What the market is pricing for Fed and global central-bank interest rates after the cease-fire
news.summary: The two-week cease-fire agreed between the U.S. and Iran has left investors less worried that major central banks will raise borrowing costs this year.

news.title: Broadcom’s stock picks up a rare downgrade. What’s behind the contrarian call.
news.summary: Analyst worries about a line from a recent Broadcom filing that suggests the company may be somewhat involved in the funding of an Anthropic data center.
